about.title: About me
about.profile_text: Software Developer specialized in cross-platform applications and logistics systems (WMS). Expert in integrating robust Backend solutions with dynamic and adaptable Frontend interfaces, under usability and accessibility standards (W3C), Clean Code principles and agile methodologies. My focus is on optimizing the client experience through data analysis, intuitive design and efficient deployment of digital assets in international technical environments.

tasks: Development of modern web interfaces with Astro and JavaScript
Implementation of styles with TailwindCSS and responsive design
Testing with Vitest in agile development environment
Development and maintenance of critical WMS modules with .NET and C#
Code quality optimization, automated testing and continuous improvement
Collaboration in technical teams under agile methodologies and code reviews
Design, updating and comprehensive maintenance of the community web portal
Social media content management and digital presence optimization

education.title: Education
education.note_main: Only 10% of what I used in this project came from these certifications.
education.note_sub: The other 90% was official documentation, Stack Overflow at 2am and the drive to understand how things really work.
education.learning_title: Real knowledge doesn't come from certificates
education.learning_text: Certifications validate concepts, but real growth comes from knowing where to look and how to learn independently. Angular's official documentation, MDN Web Docs, Stack Overflow, GitHub Issues, YouTube, Reddit, technical forums and AI itself are tools I use daily to solve real problems. A good programmer doesn't know everything, they know where to find it.
education.speech_main: Only 10% of what I used in this project came from these certifications.
education.speech_sub: The other 90% was curiosity, official documentation, errors, Stack Overflow at 2am... and the drive to understand how things really work.

entries.title: Degree in Commerce and Marketing
entries.subtitle: Faculty of Commerce, Tourism and Social Sciences

projects.title: Projects
projects.note_main: Backend projects need their own environment to run.
projects.note_sub: ...and the instructions you can't find, you'll surely find a solution. That's what programmers are for.

items.name: Movie App
items.description: Movie catalogue with real-time data from TMDB API, dynamic routes and Firebase deployment.

items.name: Kamakura Food
items.description: Interactive Japanese restaurant menu with shopping cart, category filters and unit tests.

items.name: Spotify Clone
items.description: Faithful replica of Spotify's landing page with responsive design and attention to visual detail.

items.name: Portfolio OS
items.description: This very portfolio simulating an operating system with interactive Game of Life as background.

items.name: Spring Boot Peregrinos
items.description: Full app with Spring Boot, JavaFX, object-relational database DB4O and ObjectDB built from scratch.

items.name: TrackYourMoney
items.description: Android financial management app (TFC). Expenses, income, custom categories and tips. 26 commits.

items.name: JDBC BD Application
items.description: Management application with direct SQL database connection using pure JDBC without ORM.

items.name: IMC Calculator
items.description: Desktop window with JavaFX to calculate body mass index with graphical interface.

contact.title: Contact
contact.ai_welcome: Hello! I'm Gabriel's assistant. I can help you contact him directly. Try: linkedin, email, phone, github or help 👋
contact.ai_linkedin_response: Perfect, you'll be redirected to Gabriel's LinkedIn profile in a moment... 🔗
contact.ai_email_response: Opening your mail app with Gabriel's email ready to send... ✉️
contact.ai_phone_confirm: Are you sure you want to call Gabriel? Type confirm to proceed or cancel to go back. 📞
contact.ai_phone_cancelled: Understood, call cancelled. How else can I help you? 😊
contact.ai_github_response: Taking you to Gabriel's GitHub right now... 🐙
contact.ai_help_response:
You can tell me:

• linkedin → professional profile
• email → send him an email
• phone → call him directly
• github → see his code
• about gabriel → get to know him better
contact.ai_about_response: Gabriel is a Software Developer specialized in Frontend and cross-platform systems. Currently interning at Jakala/Factoría F5. Would you like to contact him via linkedin, email or phone? 🚀
contact.ai_unknown: I didn't quite understand that... Try: linkedin, email, phone, github or help 🤔
contact.light_crime: You realize the crime you've committed?
contact.light_bubble: Now you can't see the text bubble... just like I can't see myself in this white console.
contact.light_run: I don't code light themes. I'm running away from here.
contact.terminal_help_gmail: gmail    -> Open Gmail with my address ready to receive your message
contact.terminal_tlf_error: FATAL ERROR: This command requires external hardware.
contact.terminal_tlf_manual: Please take out your phone, unlock it, open the dialer app...
contact.terminal_tlf_number: Number: +34 648446865. You know how this works.
contact.terminal_unknown_1: is not recognized as an internal command.
contact.terminal_unknown_2: You won't be able to hire me like this. Type "help" to see available commands.
contact.terminal_intro_2: (c) Gabriel Fernandez Corp. 2026. All rights reserved... mostly.
contact.terminal_hint: Type a command to get in touch. Type "help" to see available commands.

github.title: GitHub
github.speech_main: I tried to load GitHub directly here... but they blocked me with:
github.speech_sub: In the end I can show all my projects updated in real time with the public API... but I may have invented a ⭐ or two. 😄
